review_text: The new villas are excellent - clean and modern. The beach is beautiful and right behind the park. Nice new pool and playground for the kids too. Highly recommended.

We booked at the last moment for the ANZAC Day long weekend and so glad we did.  The park is excellent. Very well maintained and so close to the beautiful beach, the township of Ulladulla and my family at Dolphin Point.  Thank you BIG4 Ulladulla Beachside for having us and to the lovely lady who checked us in.  It was such a pleasure spending our time here.

Buen lugar, pero es un viejo. Los baños estaban limpios. La cocina limpia y grande. La recepcionista muy amable.
Volvería!

Nice place, but it’s a bit old. The bathrooms were clean. The kitchen was clean and spacious. The receptionist was very friendly.
I’d go back!
Right on the beach.

Sites are roomy. It's a nice park close to an absolutely beautiful  beach. Right on the highway so can be a bit noisy. Only downside is that it's not in walking distance to any pubs and restaurants. It has a good camp kitchen though. Overall it's a great place to relax and unwind.

3 bedroom cabins are the best caravan park cabins I have stayed in. They are new and have ocean views from balcony. We enjoyed our stay very much over the Australia Day long weekend. Managers were very accommodating and hospitable. Thank you so much.

Lovely place to stay. Right by the beach! Great accommodation, friendly and helpful staff. A special thanks to Alex who went out of her way to make our stay comfortable and was more than happy to go out of her way for us. We will definitely go back again.

Great cabin in a gorgeous location! We were so pleasantly surprised by the cabin. They've done a great renovation, the cabin felt brand new, it had everything we needed and made us feel at home. Absolutely loved it. The beach was less than a minute walk. Highly recommended!
It was great to stay there love it

Stumbled upon this place accidentally when another park cancelled on us 2 days before Christmas. Couldn't find it in my heart to tell my kids we had to stay home for Christmas. I called and it was like talking to an old friend we couldn't get down to Ulladulla from Sydney fast enough to enjoy our Christmas. Pulled in at 10pm xmas eve and wow we woke up in one of the best spots we ever. The park is one of the best. Staff are amazing and friendly always on hand to help accommodate any issues of needs. We love this place so much we came back a week later with friends to show them. Definitely recommend this place you won't be disappointed. Thank you to our new friends at Ulladulla big 4 we will definitely see you all again very soon 😍🍻

Fantastic stay. We stayed in villa 6, great spot close to the beach access. Villa was very comfortable and well played out with everything you need. The managers were friendly and helpful. Would definitely go there again.

We stayed at one of the 3 bedroom Villa’s for a recent getaway this 2026 summer holiday period, highly recommend. The park was filled with families holiday making, it was such a great atmosphere and at the same time, found it to be so nice and quiet. The Villa’s had all the necessities and then some. We also loved the location, with grassing area for the kids, pool, playground and direct access to Racecourse beach - listening to waves overnight was bliss. We’ll be back!

Alex and Sean are great. The whole experience was fantastic for our family.
Thank you

Alex and Sean are amazing hosts.

The park was clean and tidy and although we were close to the pool and playground, mornings and evenings were lovely and quiet

We have just had an amazing 2.5 week holiday at Big 4 Beachside in Ulladulla. The managers were excellent and always helpful. They kept the facilities clean at all times. And now with the addition of the pool, and the beach right there, it stands out as one of the best parks we have visited. Our site was large enough that we did not feel cramped. We were close to the laundry and unfortunately travellers were not always considerate and used the washing machine and tumble dryer late into the night which could be noisy.
They have some further development plans, and I am sure that will only make the park better.
We look forward to returning again.
Amazing!! A+++++++++ very clean and beautiful highly recommended 👌 👍🏽 Thank you Alex and Sean 😊
We had a great stay thank you. staff were friendly, helpful and supportive. The park was clean and tidy. We meet some nice neighbours as well.
Great holiday park right on the beach, great for families and kids also very clean, will definitely stay again !

Our stay was amazing. The place was spotless, comfortable, and had everything we needed. The location was perfect, the atmosphere was relaxing, and the service was outstanding. We couldn’t have asked for a better experience — highly recommend.
Great Spot!! Cabins were clean and generous in size, perfect beach is a short  walk, pool and playground a huge asset when travelling with kids! Thanks, will be back :)
All good thanks
The owners where friendly and the grounds and facilities where nice and clean. Being close to the beach acces. Would definitely stay there again
Our stay at big4 beachside Ulladulla was fantastic. The 3 bedroom villa we booked was perfect, Sean and Alex were so helpful, would definitely book again

Managers Alex & Sean are extremely helpful & pleasant . Look forward to returning to the park in the future .Close to the beach , the kids thoroughly enjoyed the play park & swimming pool, beautiful grass area in front of our cabins . Cannot think of anything negative , Highly recommend
Great place, close to Ulladulla drive or walk, 5min walk to beach

We planned to stay at Ulladulla for 3 nights, but due to car trouble we were there for 22 days. The Managers Sean & Alex were beyond helpful and considerate to our situation. Because we were 1 km out of town they drove us to the shops and recommended a good mechanic.
Besides that the park was well maintained and clean and of course a fantastic private beach adjacent to the park.

Beach access! Accept dogs and close to town.
Let's get that new pool finished
Great value, clean and spacious cabins. Comfy beds, only takes 1 minute walk to be on the beach
Powered and unpowered site, water hookup, beach access but on a fairly busy road so traffic noise 24/7.  Building a pool area and children’s playground which will be nice when finished

It's not much of a caravan park anymore. Seems to have been taken over by cabins - many permanent occupants. The managers are lovely, amenities and kitchen are clean. Just not the sort of place I'd ever want to take a holiday. Maybe just an overnighter if desperate?
Great place to wind down and spend  some quality time out with family and friends , beach was only 2 min walk such and amazing place
Great quiet park, very helpful and friendly managers.

We recently had a fantastic family holiday in Ulladulla, and it couldn’t have been more special, thanks to Shawn and Alex at the holiday park. From the moment we arrived, they went above and beyond to make our stay enjoyable. Their warm hospitality and attention to detail made all the difference, especially with our baby boy having the most pleasant sleep and our greyhound having the time of his life. Whether it was helping us with local recommendations or ensuring our accommodation was perfect, Shawn and Alex truly made us feel at home. We left with great memories and can’t wait to return. Highly recommended!

Been on a holiday for a long weekend here. Amenities are top notch and well maintained. Cabins and villas are brand new with modern amenities. Helpful staff and quick access to the beautiful Racecourse beach. Overall, a wonderful place to stay for a holiday. Highly recommend this place.
Staff were beyond welcoming and helpful and the apartments if you would call them that are more like a house were beautiful, highly recommended!

Nice park direct access to beach.
Currently having some updates
Nice green grass, trail done to a beautiful beach, toilet & showrrs clean

Netter Betreiber. Wir hatten eine powered Site für eine Nacht. Sie war sehr gross. Die sanitären Anlagen sind sauber. Es besteht ein direkter Zugang zum Strand. Am Morgen konnten wir beim Sonnenaufgang Delfine vom Strand aus beobachten.

Really nice little park to stay in for a night or longer. The amenities were clean, and there was a great big camp kitchen to use. Short walk to the beach for some swimming or fishing, or a romantic walk.

Great location right on the beach side as the name suggests. Clean grassy sites, spotless amenities and surrounds. Alex and Shawn are super friendly and accommodating, Thank you. We will stay again next time we are in town.

Great stay, lovely young owners, very welcoming and helpful, powered site was big for my little van, close beach access, very quiet beach.
Amenities were great. Definitely would stay again.
Can't say I loved it

Really nice and helpful managers, direct beach access, new equipment and clean facilities. Huge grass sites. A little bit uneven sites and a lot of flies when we visited, but both did not bother us. It was pretty quiet and relaxing in the park.
Beautiful park, would visit again
Wonderful location, great new cabins.
Awesome place !!!!!

Great managers
Clean ammenities
Direct beach access
